title: ImageWorld
description: This mod turns images or video frames into terrain!
body:
This mod is very command based, as all commands start with /ImageWorld. 

The terrain editor has branched off my FractalWorld mod, and has a lot of similar commands like setting the column loading speed, and has new ones like coordinate modes and frame index. 

It is hard to explain how to use this mod, as for making videos with it requires VLC Media player and speciffic formatting. I made a tutorial video to explain more.

World presets that will set the entire world to completely custom biomes, more refactoring to make the mod easier to use, and more are coming soon!

Showcase and Tutorial: [https://youtu.be/MrhjTJs6R9U](https://youtu.be/MrhjTJs6R9U)
